lessons.name: Unit 8: Films
lessons.description: Learn about films with although/though and however for contrast.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
WordType & IPAMeaningExample
Film(n) /fɪlm/PhimI love watching films.
Movie(n) /ˈmuːvi/Phim (Mỹ)Let's watch a movie.
Cinema(n) /ˈsɪnəmə/Rạp chiếu phimWe go to the cinema.
Actor(n) /ˈæktə(r)/Diễn viên namHe is a famous actor.
Actress(n) /ˈæktrəs/Diễn viên nữShe is a talented actress.
Director(n) /dəˈrektə(r)/Đạo diễnThe director is creative.
Character(n) /ˈkærəktə(r)/Nhân vậtThe main character is brave.
Plot(n) /plɒt/Cốt truyệnThe plot is interesting.
Scene(n) /siːn/Cảnh quayThat scene is exciting.
Review(n) /rɪˈvjuː/Bài đánh giáI read the film review.
Critic(n) /ˈkrɪtɪk/Nhà phê bìnhCritics love this film.
Star(v,n) /stɑː(r)/Đóng vai chính, ngôi saoHe stars in the film.
Gripping(adj) /ˈɡrɪpɪŋ/Hấp dẫn, lôi cuốnIt's a gripping film.
Moving(adj) /ˈmuːvɪŋ/Cảm độngThe film is very moving.
Scary(adj) /ˈskeəri/Đáng sợHorror films are scary.

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng (Vocabulary Practice)
sections.content:
Types of films (Thể loại phim):

  • action film: phim hành động
  • comedy: phim hài
  • horror film: phim kinh dị
  • science fiction (sci-fi): phim khoa học viễn tưởng
  • romantic film: phim lãng mạn
  • thriller: phim ly kỳ
  • documentary: phim tài liệu
  • animation: phim hoạt hình
  • fantasy: phim giả tưởng

People in films:

  • actor/actress: diễn viên
  • director: đạo diễn
  • producer: nhà sản xuất
  • screenwriter: biên kịch
  • critic: nhà phê bình
  • audience: khán giả

Adjectives to describe films:

  • gripping: hấp dẫn
  • moving: cảm động
  • scary: đáng sợ
  • boring: nhàm chán
  • exciting: thú vị
  • hilarious: vui nhộn
  • violent: bạo lực
  • entertaining: giải trí

Verbs related to films:

  • watch: xem
  • see: xem
  • star: đóng vai chính
  • direct: đạo diễn
  • produce: sản xuất
  • review: đánh giá

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ âm (Pronunciation)
sections.content:
Sounds /iː/ and /ɪ/

1. Sound /iː/ (âm dài):

  • Phát âm: Âm dài, môi căng
  • Examples:
  • scene /siːn/
  • see /siː/
  • feel /fiːl/
  • screen /skriːn/

2. Sound /ɪ/ (âm ngắn):

  • Phát âm: Âm ngắn, môi thả lỏng
  • Examples:
  • film /fɪlm/
  • critic /ˈkrɪtɪk/
  • gripping /ˈɡrɪpɪŋ/
  • cinema /ˈsɪnəmə/

sections.heading: 4. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
A. Although/Though (Mặc dù)

1. Cấu trúc:

  • Although/Though + S + V, S + V
  • Ex: Although the film was long, it was interesting.
  • Ex: Though he is young, he is talented.
  • S + V + although/though + S + V
  • Ex: The film was interesting although it was long.

2. Cách dùng:

  • Diễn tả sự tương phản, đối lập
  • Although = Though (không có sự khác biệt)
  • Không dùng 'but' trong cùng câu với although/though
  • Sai: Although the film was long, but it was interesting. ✗
  • Đúng: Although the film was long, it was interesting. ✓

B. However (Tuy nhiên)

1. Cấu trúc:

  • S + V. However, S + V.
  • Ex: The film was long. However, it was interesting.
  • S + V; however, S + V.
  • Ex: The film was long; however, it was interesting.

2. Cách dùng:

  • Nối hai câu có ý nghĩa đối lập
  • However đứng đầu câu thứ hai, sau dấu chấm hoặc dấu chấm phẩy
  • Sau however có dấu phẩy

3. So sánh Although và However:

  • Although: nối hai mệnh đề trong một câu
  • Ex: Although the film was long, it was interesting.
  • However: nối hai câu
  • Ex: The film was long. However, it was interesting.

4. Lưu ý:

  • Although/Though = liên từ (conjunction)
  • However = trạng từ liên kết (conjunctive adverb)
  • Không dùng although và however trong cùng một câu

sections.heading: 5. Getting Started
sections.content:
Chủ đề: What's on at the cinema? - Có gì ở rạp chiếu phim?

Nội dung chính:

  • Hội thoại về phim
  • Giới thiệu các thể loại phim
  • Nói về sở thích xem phim

sections.heading: 6. A Closer Look 1
sections.content:
A. Vocabulary: Films and cinema

  • Học từ vựng về phim
  • Học từ vựng về rạp chiếu phim

B. Pronunciation: /iː/ and /ɪ/

  • Phân biệt âm /iː/ và /ɪ/
  • Luyện phát âm từ và câu

sections.heading: 7. A Closer Look 2
sections.content:
Grammar: Although/Though and However

  • Học cách dùng although/though
  • Học cách dùng however
  • Luyện tập nối câu

sections.heading: 8. Communication
sections.content:
Chủ đề: Talking about films

Useful expressions:

  • What kind of film is it?
  • Who stars in it?
  • What do you think of...?
  • I think it's...

sections.heading: 9. Skills 1 (Reading & Speaking)
sections.content:
Reading: Film reviews

  • Đọc hiểu về đánh giá phim
  • Tìm thông tin chi tiết

Speaking: Discussing favourite films

  • Nói về phim yêu thích
  • Đưa ra ý kiến về phim

sections.heading: 10. Looking Back
sections.content:
Ôn tập:

  • Vocabulary: Films and cinema
  • Pronunciation: /iː/ and /ɪ/
  • Grammar: Although/Though, However

sections.heading: 11. Project
sections.content:
Đề tài: My favourite film

Nhiệm vụ:

  • Chọn một bộ phim yêu thích
  • Tìm thông tin và hình ảnh
  • Viết đánh giá (7-10 câu)
  • Trình bày trước lớp

sections.heading: 12. Skills 2 (Listening & Writing)
sections.content:
Listening: About a film

  • Nghe về một bộ phim
  • Ghi chú thông tin quan trọng

Writing: A film review

  • Viết đánh giá phim
  • Sử dụng although/though và however

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Sử dụng although/though
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Although/Though + S + V, S + V
  • Diễn tả sự tương phản trong một câu
  • Không dùng 'but' cùng although/though

examples.question: ______ the film was long, it was interesting.
examples.solution: Although/Though the film was long, it was interesting.
examples.explanation: Hai ý đối lập trong một câu → although/though.

examples.question: He is young. He is talented. (although)
examples.solution: Although he is young, he is talented.
examples.explanation: Nối hai câu đối lập bằng although.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Sử dụng however
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • S + V. However, S + V.
  • Nối hai câu có ý nghĩa đối lập
  • However đứng đầu câu thứ hai

examples.question: The film was long. It was interesting. (however)
examples.solution: The film was long. However, it was interesting.
examples.explanation: Nối hai câu đối lập bằng however.

examples.question: He is young. ______, he is talented.
examples.solution: He is young. However, he is talented.
examples.explanation: However nối hai câu đối lập.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Phân biệt although và however
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Although: nối hai mệnh đề trong một câu
  • However: nối hai câu

examples.question: Choose: The film was long, ______ it was interesting. (although/however)
examples.solution: Although the film was long, it was interesting.

examples.question: Choose: The film was long. ______, it was interesting. (Although/However)
examples.solution: The film was long. However, it was interesting.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Viết lại câu
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Chuyển đổi giữa although và however
  • Giữ nguyên nghĩa câu

examples.question: Although the film was long, it was interesting. (Rewrite with 'however')
examples.solution: The film was long. However, it was interesting.
examples.explanation: Chuyển although thành however, tách thành hai câu.

examples.question: The film was boring. However, I watched it. (Rewrite with 'although')
examples.solution: Although the film was boring, I watched it.
examples.explanation: Chuyển however thành although, gộp thành một câu.

exercises.question: ______ the film was long, it was interesting.
exercises.explanation: Một câu, hai mệnh đề đối lập → Although.

exercises.question: The film was long. ______, it was interesting.
______ he is young, he is talented.
He is young. ______, he is talented.
The film was boring. ______, I watched it.
______ the film was scary, I enjoyed it.
She is a good actress. ______, she is not famous.
______ the plot was simple, the film was moving.
The film got bad reviews. ______, it was successful.
______ critics loved it, the film was not popular.
